name: Dove's Nest White Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Cannellini Beans with Liquid (19 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion and cook until it begins to soften, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Add garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, being careful not to brown the garlic.
4. Add tomatoes, tomatillos, and jalapeno. Cook until the tomatillos are soft.
5. Stir in chicken stock, green chilies, cooked chicken, oregano, cumin, cilantro, beans, and lime juice.
6. Heat through and season with salt and pepper to taste.
